opening_npc_line: I need that report on my desk by 5pm. No excuses.

turns.user_input: This is completely unfair. I was never given the data.
turns.npc_response: Fairness isn't my concern, meeting deadlines is, and right now you're falling short.

turns.user_input: I refuse to submit an incomplete report. That is not my fault.
turns.npc_response: Submit what you have, or submit your resignation, your choice, but decide now.

turns.user_input: You are being unreasonable. No one can do this.
turns.npc_response: Unreasonable is not meeting expectations, and if you can't handle expectations, then you're not needed here.

turns.user_input: I hate this job. This is ridiculous.
turns.npc_response: Hate the job or love it, that's your problem, but what I hate is incompetence, and right now that's what I'm seeing.
Don't let the door hit you on the way out, and don't bother coming back for your things, they'll be mailed to you.
